name: rank-radar
description: RankRadar — visibilidad en tiempo real de repos GitHub trending, modelos de IA y consumo en OpenRouter

scripts.pipeline: node scripts/fetch-github-trending.mjs && node scripts/fetch-aa-models.mjs && node scripts/fetch-openrouter.mjs && node scripts/build-json.mjs
scripts.pipeline:all: node scripts/fetch-github-trending.mjs && node scripts/fetch-aa-models.mjs && node scripts/fetch-openrouter.mjs && node scripts/fetch-exploreyc.mjs && node scripts/build-json.mjs
scripts.news:fetch: node scripts/news/fetch-huggingface.mjs && node scripts/news/fetch-hackernews.mjs && node scripts/news/fetch-reddit.mjs && node scripts/news/fetch-arxiv.mjs && node scripts/news/fetch-github-ai.mjs
scripts.news:test: node scripts/news/fetch-huggingface.mjs && node scripts/news/fetch-hackernews.mjs && node scripts/news/fetch-reddit.mjs && node scripts/news/fetch-arxiv.mjs && node scripts/news/fetch-github-ai.mjs
